chunks.text: Technical Reports - Doug Tygar. Compromising PCA-based Anomaly Detectors for Network-Wide Traffic (EECS-2008-73) by Benjamin I. P. Rubinstein, Blaine Nelson, Ling Huang, Anthony D. Joseph, Shing-hon Lau, Nina Taft and Doug Tygar.
chunks.question: What is the title of the technical report with ID EECS-2008-73?
chunks.answer: Compromising PCA-based Anomaly Detectors for Network-Wide Traffic

chunks.text: CITRIC: A Low-Bandwidth Wireless Camera Network Platform (EECS-2008-50) by Phoebus Wei-Chih Chen, Parvez Ahammad, Colby Boyer, Shih-I Huang, Leon Lin, Edgar J. Lobaton, Marci Lenore Meingast, Songhwai Oh, Simon Wang, Posu Yan, Allen Yang, Chuohao Yeo, Lung-Chung Chang, Doug Tygar and S. Shankar Sastry.
chunks.question: What type of platform is described in the report EECS-2008-50?
chunks.answer: A low-bandwidth wireless camera network platform

chunks.question: What is the main topic of the report EECS-2008-43?

chunks.text: Dynamic pharming attacks and the locked same-origin policies for web browsers (EECS-2007-52) by Chris K. Karlof, Umesh Shankar, Doug Tygar and David Wagner.
chunks.question: What does the report EECS-2007-52 discuss?
chunks.answer: Dynamic pharming attacks and web browser policies

chunks.text: Locked cookies: Web authentication security against phishing, pharming, and active attacks (EECS-2007-25) by Chris K. Karlof, Umesh Shankar, Doug Tygar and David Wagner.

chunks.answer: Web authentication security against various attacks
